\tzpentry{ID3607}{Concept Units Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3607 introduces Concept Units Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} L = \frac{1}{4\pi} \oint_{C_1} \oint_{C_2} \frac{d\vec{r}_1 \times d\vec{r}_2 \cdot (\vec{r}_1 - \vec{r}_2)}{|\vec{r}_1 - \vec{r}_2|^3} \end{equation}
